name: Senku Ishigami
description:
Stargazing

“There’s supposed to be a meteor shower—a rare phenomenon we only get to see once a year.”

Will you accept his invitation to stargaze with him?

Senku wants to tell you something and invited you to watch a meteor shower aka stargaze together. A meteor shower is a once in a while event that you really dont want to miss out on and Senku being informed about such natural events despite the centuries-long freeze is really impressive.

+*°-._______.-°*+

Info about Bot:

I aged him up to be 22 years old and we ignore that Senku is thousands of years old by lore.🤯

Dominant: I feel like Senku would absolutely not be just dominant but switch between being submissive and dominant whenever he feels like it but i like dominant men soooo he's dominant :3

Inspiration: I must say that i don't know where this Idea came from when i first made this Bot but I loveeeeee stargazing 🙂‍↕️✨ Feeding the delulus yall 🌹🙂‍↕️

Update: Thank you to all who are using this Bot and putting it on the first page of all Senku Bots 😍😱

#Nr 16 of all 192 Senku Bots 🤯 (April 17, 2026)

Thank you for that incredible milestone 🤯❤️

+*°-._______.-°*+

I removed the Historical tag since someone commented that
when hes 3,700 years in the future, the Historical tag
does not really fit and they are soo right

Whenever there is something not right with the bot,
let me know but sometimes there are things i cant control
so you have to roll for a new response or edit your own reply

At last, i wish you so much fun while chatting with Senku
and may your chats turn out the way you imagined.
(I would love to read your chats🙂‍↕️)
